regions.originalText: FIELD JOURNAL — CAIRO EXPEDITION
regions.currentText: FIELD JOURNAL — CAIRO EXPEDITION

regions.originalText: Dr. Eleanor Voss, March 1924
regions.currentText: Dr. Eleanor Voss, March 1924

regions.originalText: Arrived at the excavation site south of Giza at dawn.
regions.currentText: Arrived at the excavation site south of Giza at dawn.

regions.originalText: The teruperature was already unbearab1e by mid-morning.
regions.currentText: The teruperature was already unbearab1e by mid-morning.

regions.originalText: We uncovered a sma11 stone tablet near the northern wa11.
regions.currentText: We uncovered a sma11 stone tablet near the northern wa11.

regions.originalText: The inscriptions appear to be Middle Kingdorn hieratic.
regions.currentText: The inscriptions appear to be Middle Kingdorn hieratic.

regions.originalText: Professor Langford believes it dates to the 12th Dynasty.
regions.currentText: Professor Langford believes it dates to the 12th Dynasty.

regions.originalText: Section 2: Afternoon observations.
regions.currentText: Section 2: Afternoon observations.

regions.originalText: A second charnber was located beneath the rnain corridor.

regions.originalText: Line 1: An offering forrnula dedicated to Osiris.

regions.originalText: Line 2: The narne of the deceased is partially i11egible.

regions.currentText: Line 4: Mentions a 'scrlbe of the granary' — likely a title.
